authors: Mike Cowburn Ulrike Klinger Anders Olof Larsson a European University Viadrina
Germanyb Department of Political and Social Science
Germanyc Amsterdam School of Communication Research
raw_title: Campaigning in the Age of Platforms: A Longitudinal Analysis of German Parties & Politicians
title_en: Campaigning in the Age of Platforms: A Longitudinal Analysis of German Parties & Politicians
title_zh: 平台时代的竞选活动：德国政党与政治人物的纵向分析
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究分析了德国政党和政治人物如何随着时间推移，在数字平台上进行竞选活动。它探讨了平台时代对政治传播的影响。
plain_summary_en: This study analyzes how German political parties and politicians conduct campaigns on digital platforms over time. It explores the impact of the platform era on political communication.
research_direction_zh: 研究数字媒体和平台如何改变政治竞选策略和沟通模式，特别是在德国政治背景下的长期演变。
research_direction_en: Investigating how digital media and platforms transform political campaign strategies and communication patterns, particularly in the context of German politics over time.
